channel.title: The AI Sales Leader: Insights
channel.description: Straight answers on sales leadership, revenue growth, and AI-powered sales teams, from Greg Grand.

item.title: How to Roll Out AI to a Sales Team: System First, Tools Second
item.description: Stop guessing how to roll out AI to a sales team. Greg Grand reveals the truth: Your system comes first. Tools follow. Drive real revenue, not just tech adoption.

item.title: How to Use AI to Prepare for a Discovery Call in 15 Minutes
item.description: Revolutionize your sales prep. Learn how to use AI to prepare for a discovery call in just minutes, gaining critical insights and closing more deals faster. Stop guessing.

item.title: Using AI for Sales Prospecting Research: Smarter Hunting
item.description: Master how to use AI for sales prospecting research without sounding like a bot. Greg Grand reveals the framework for finding ideal clients and closing more deals.
